token.title: MeshCentral — Login Token
token.description: Paste the full login token from MeshCentral → My Account → Login Tokens. The token contains both username and password.

Use SSL (disable if behind reverse proxy/tlsOffload)

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check token or credentials
